name: agent_discovery
description: Find ERC-8004 registered AI agents across 45+ chains. Search by name, capability, or category. Returns top matches with trust scores, health status, and protocol support (MCP, A2A, OASF, x402). Powered by ACK Protocol.

query.description: Search query: agent name, capability, or category (e.g. 'trading', 'security audit', 'DeFi')

chain.description: Optional chain filter: abstract, base, ethereum, celo, bsc, arbitrum
